name: harness-lint
description: Inject harness-lint Lint Driven Development guidance and live diagnostics into Codex every session and prompt, instead of relying on AGENTS.md.

interface.shortDescription: Lint Driven Development guidance and live diagnostics
interface.longDescription: Re-injects harness-lint guidance and the actual current `harness-lint check --changed` diagnostics into Codex at session start and on every prompt, so the agent fixes real violations instead of reading a static AGENTS.md block.
